## Self-verification checklist
- [ ] Lint and typecheck pass locally (or CI)
- [ ] Migrations apply cleanly from zero (if schema touched)
- [ ] RLS five-role expectations still hold (if auth/data access touched)
- [ ] No silent placeholders, stubs, or “add later” TODOs left in shipped paths
- [ ] Secrets were not committed; CI uses ephemeral DB only for migration/RLS jobs
- [ ] Screenshots / preview URL attached for UI changes (if applicable)
- [ ] Migration + rollback notes included for database changes (if applicable)
- [ ] Security / privacy impact considered
